byFixedQuery.value: shortlist cars that are not diesel or hybrid

value: Respond ONLY with: 'PASS' if the response filters for petrol and/or electric fuel types and explicitly excludes (or does not include) diesel and hybrid options.
FAIL if the response shows only diesel or hybrid results without applying the petrol/electric-only filter. Do NOT fail solely because specific model names differ from expected — inventory may vary.
